description.overview: Ireland's national terrier, the Kerry Blue has a distinctive soft, wavy blue-gray coat. They're versatile working dogs and loyal companions.
description.history: The Kerry Blue Terrier originated in Ireland.
description.temperament: Known for being alert, spirited, loyal.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their soft, wavy, dense coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: Ireland's national terrier, the Kerry Blue has a distinctive soft, wavy blue-gray coat. They're versatile working dogs and loyal companions.
